description: Product Description Food Grade Silicone Drain Basket Collapsible Colander is perfect workhorse cooking; food preparation tool that every modern kitchen needs. Designed with your health and convenience in mind, your experience with them will be safe, so make your time in the kitchen easier, simpler starting now. Features Non-slip bottom section for safety. Dishwasher safe Save Space Travel friendly BPA FREE! VERSATILE and EFFICIENT These silicone collapsible colander are incredibly versatile and can handle a wide range of straining tasks. The silicone strainer is perfect for straining of pasta, also the silicone collapsible colander is ideal for rinsing berries or straining small portions. Easy to Operate Easily drain,The raised bottom lets water drain fast and easy, so you can spend more time doing the things you love. Easy to Store Foldable storage, design with holes, can be hung when not in use, saving space. They are tall when folded, so it is very easy to store them in a kitchen drawer or cabinet.
